sample the 8-channel upper-four-layer value-embedding gate input evenly across hidden-state channels with meta-safe static indices instead of using the first contiguous slice
switch the exp062 upper-four-layer value-embedding gate from per-KV-head outputs to one shared scalar gate per token
reduce the exp062 evenly sampled upper-four-layer value-embedding gate input from 8 channels to 6 channels
add a learnable bias to the exp062 per-KV-head value-embedding gate so each upper-layer head can shift its default injection strength independently of the 8 sampled channels
widen the exp062 evenly sampled upper-four-layer value-embedding gate input from 8 to 12 channels in the 5-layer 384-dim 4-head full-attention stack
restrict the exp062 value-embedding path to the top three layers while keeping the 8-channel evenly sampled per-KV-head gate in the 5-layer 384-dim 4-head full-attention stack
RMS-normalize the exp062 evenly sampled 8-channel value-embedding gate input before the per-KV-head gate projection
revisit exp065 with explicit zero-initialized per-KV-head bias on the exp062 evenly sampled 8-channel upper-layer value gate
taper the exp062 upper-layer value-embedding depth scale across the four VE-active layers so the first injected block is weakest and the top block stays full strength
replace the exp062 upper-layer value-embedding gate with a zero-initialized 8-to-8-to-4 SiLU MLP so the 8 evenly sampled channels can interact before producing per-KV-head gates
replace the exp062 8-channel evenly sampled value-gate probes with 8 evenly partitioned hidden-state band means before the per-KV-head gate
replace the exp062 evenly sampled upper-four-layer per-KV-head value gate activation with 1+tanh instead of 2*sigmoid so unit initialization is preserved with a less saturating gate
initialize the learned x0 residual skip with a 0.16-to-0.04 depth taper so lower blocks start with stronger direct access to token embeddings than upper blocks
initialize the learned x0 residual skip with a 0.04-to-0.16 depth taper so upper blocks start with stronger direct access to token embeddings than lower blocks
lower the exp062 flat learned x0 residual skip initialization from 0.1 to 0.05 so token-embedding injection starts weaker across all five layers
gate the exp062 upper-layer value-embedding injection from normalized token-embedding x0 instead of the current hidden state so lexical identity steers VE strength
blend the exp062 upper-layer value-embedding gate probe between normalized hidden state and normalized token-embedding x0 so VE strength can use both context and lexical identity
reallocate the exp062 FFN budget across depth with a 3x,3x,4x,5x,5x MLP schedule so upper layers get more feed-forward capacity at fixed average 4x expansion
phase-shift the exp062 8-channel upper-layer value-gate probes by layer so each VE-active block samples a different sparse hidden-state subset
optimize the tiny upper-layer value-embedding gate projections with AdamW instead of grouping them into Muon matrix updates
replace the exp062 ReLU-squared FFN with a parameter-matched SwiGLU block so the improved evenly sampled upper-four-layer value-gated stack gets multiplicative channel selection

add a zero-initialized per-KV-head bias to the exp062 upper-four-layer value gate and optimize non-matrix transformer params with AdamW so each head can shift its default VE injection without Muon crashes
RMS-normalize per-head value embeddings before the exp083 gate scales and injects them so the new per-KV-head bias controls a stable VE magnitude
extend the stabilized exp083 per-KV-head gated value-embedding path to layer 0 so all five blocks can inject lexical value features
add zero-initialized per-KV-head log gains on the exp083 upper-four-layer value-embedding path so gate bias sets the default injection while each head can separately learn VE amplitude

initialize the exp086 per-KV-head value-embedding log gains slightly below zero so the gate-biased upper-layer VE path starts at about 0.8x amplitude and each head can scale up conservatively during training

add a zero-initialized per-layer log gain on top of the exp087 upper-layer value-embedding path so each VE-active block can globally rebalance lexical injection in addition to the existing per-head gains
initialize the exp087 per-KV-head value-embedding log gains more conservatively so the gate-biased upper-layer VE path starts at about 0.7x amplitude and each head can scale up only if needed

depth-taper the exp089 upper-layer per-KV-head value-embedding gain initialization so lower VE-active blocks start around 0.55x and the top block starts around 0.85x while keeping the same average 0.7x injection strength

bug-fixed rerun of the exp090 depth-tapered upper-layer per-KV-head value-embedding gain initialization so lower VE-active blocks start around 0.55x and the top block starts around 0.85x while keeping the same average 0.7x injection strength

increase the exp089 upper-layer per-KV-head value gate from 8 to 12 evenly sampled hidden-state probe channels so each head sees a slightly richer sparse context before scaling lexical value injection
initialize the exp089 upper-layer per-KV-head value gate biases slightly negative so the default lexical injection starts just under 1x before the existing 0.7x per-head gains scale it
lower the exp089 upper-layer per-KV-head value-embedding gain initialization from about 0.7x to 0.6x so lexical injection starts even more conservatively before training can scale it up
compress the exp089 upper-layer per-KV-head value gate to a 0.5-to-1.5 tanh band around unit scale so VE injection stays adaptive but less extreme than the prior 0-to-2 sigmoid gate
halve the value-embedding AdamW learning rate relative to token embeddings so the exp089 gated upper-layer lexical path updates more conservatively than the main token table
remove the exp089 built-in upper-layer VE depth taper so every VE-active block starts at the same conservative per-head lexical injection amplitude instead of weakening lower upper layers by default
restrict the exp089 gated value-embedding path to the upper half of layers so lexical reinjection happens later after lower blocks build context
switch the exp089 full-attention stack to grouped-query attention with 2 KV heads so pairs of query heads share K/V and the gated value-embedding path becomes lower-rank
same-width 6-layer version of the exp089 384-dim 4-head full-attention upper-four-layer gated value-embedding stack
